about.valueDescription: PreGVT is the world's first dual-listed digital token bridging traditional finance and blockchain. Issued by PreGVT Group (Fitch A-), it's built on Ethereum, open to public fundraising, and backed by regulated financial credit, marking a milestone in tokenized assets.

step2.title: Step 2: Deposit Ethereum Chain Tokens (ETH, USDT supported)
step2.description: Connect your wallet and deposit supported tokens for purchase

step3.title: Step 3: Participate in Presale and Buy PreGVT
step3.description: Select purchase amount, confirm transaction and complete purchase process

step4.title: Step 4: Private Sale Ends, Exchange Listing
step4.description: Wait for private sale to end, tokens will be listed on major exchanges

about.newEraDescription: As the cryptocurrency market rapidly evolves, volatility and risk often make investors cautious—turning the space into what many call the "Wild West" of finance. PreGVT Token changes that narrative by introducing a regulated, asset-backed, and high-credit digital token designed for long-term stability and investor confidence. Built on transparency and real-world value, it marks a new era of secure, compliant, and credible digital investment.

realAssetAnchoring.title: Real Asset Anchoring
realAssetAnchoring.description: Each PreGVT  corresponds to underlying real assets, not worthless algorithmic stablecoins, with clear value.

strongCreditBacking.title: Strong Credit Backing
strongCreditBacking.description: The issuer is a wholly state-owned enterprise with high credit rating and guaranteed repayment capability.

compliantInnovative.title: 100% Compliant and Innovative
compliantInnovative.description: Issued and publicly listed according to international laws and regulations, reflecting financial technology innovation within the regulatory framework.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We have compiled the questions you care about most to help you quickly understand the presale details and process of PreGVT.

questions.question: What is PreGVT?
questions.answer: The world's first financial product that combines "public offering", "exchange listing" and "RWA digital token" features. Token name: PreGVT  (PreGVT Coin), issued on the Ethereum public chain.

questions.question: How do I buy PreGVT?
questions.answer: PreGVT is currently in presale stage and can only be purchased through the official PreGVT001.com website. Note: Please do not attempt to purchase from Uniswap, Pancakeswap, Raydium or any other platform, as these are unofficial platforms and may involve fraudulent activities.

questions.question: How do I check my purchased token quantity?
questions.answer: You can view your purchased token quantity and balance in your created account.

questions.question: How do I claim my tokens?
questions.answer: After participating in the purchase, tokens will be displayed in your account balance. After PreGVT is sold out, you can claim your tokens.

questions.question: Does the presale support fiat currency? What are the minimum/maximum purchase amounts?
questions.answer: Currently, PreGVT presale does not support fiat currency, only Ethereum (ERC-20) assets. Minimum purchase amount per account is 100 USD, maximum purchase amount is 5000 USD.

questions.question: How to contact the official PreGVT team?
questions.answer: You can contact the official email PreGVT001@proton.me or join the official Telegram community to contact administrators.

info.valueDescription: Traditionally, such high-quality state-credit tokens are monopolized by large institutions, making them difficult for individual investors to access. Through tokenization, we break down this top-tier asset into accessible units, allowing you to become a "shareholder" of core assets at a lower threshold and share in development dividends. Global debut! PreGVT TOKEN presale begins, limited spots available, this window of opportunity won't open again. Act now to secure future returns.
info.financialDisclaimerDesc: This page outlines milestone targets for product and community growth. It is not financial advice or a promise of returns.
info.investmentWarningDesc: This page outlines milestone targets for product and community growth. It is not financial advice or a promise of returns.
info.targetBandsDesc: Target price bands are indicative and may adjust with milestone completion and market conditions. All metrics rely on on-chain data and third-party dashboards/audits.
info.mainTokenPreviewDesc: This preview price helps early agents and investors understand the target value of the main token before TGE (Token Generation Event). It is not from the LP (liquidity pool), not from DexScreener, and not connected to the preGVT market price. This is a UI-only preview for investor confidence and agent communication purposes.

roadmap.title: PreGVT Roadmap
roadmap.description: This roadmap shows the magnificent journey of PreGVT from initial seed funding, gradual growth, to full integration with mainstream financial markets. The pre-token stage is for GVT (Global Value Token) investment, while rGGP remains the ecosystem reward token for NFT holders and community incentives. The earlier you participate, the greater the potential returns. Public offering will be conducted on major global cryptocurrency exchanges (Binance, Coinbase, OKX, Bybit), while ensuring the underlying RWA asset pool is fully established and begins generating stable returns.
roadmap.q3Desc: AGV protocol successfully launched a presale digital tokens on the BSC chain in Hong Kong. Token name: preGVT. This pre- token represents the direct investment route to GVT. (Green Value token).
roadmap.q4Desc: Presale starts from seed round at $0.005 to launch price of $0.15 in Q4 2025! This is a clear value discovery path for the preGVT → GVT investment route. The decision you make now will determine your starting point in this journey.
roadmap.q1Desc: Q1 2026 will be the most glorious milestone in our journey, as we complete the final leap from private sale to public listing, begin trading, and open a new chapter. PreGVT tokens will convert to GVT, while rGGP remains the ecosystem reward token for NFT holders and community incentives.

bottom.title: Transparent System
bottom.description: We use a transparent, verifiable milestone system. 72-hour notice before changes.

top.title: Milestone-Driven Early Access
top.description: This is a milestone-driven early access. Target bands adjust as public metrics unlock; please DYOR. Shown ranges are target bands. Tiers unlock and may adjust based on on-chain data and third-party dashboards. Any unsold amount may roll over to the next tier.

bottom.title: Transparent Milestone System
bottom.description: We use a transparent, verifiable milestone system. When preset thresholds (wallets/tasks/partnerships/audit, etc.) are met, the next tier unlocks and the target band advances. For clarity, we issue a 72-hour notice before changes.
